title: Quantitative Backtesting Engine
subtitle: Finance research platform
description: A modular quantitative research platform for designing, testing, and analyzing trading strategies on historical market data.
label: Backtesting Engine

title: Oracle Financial Analysis
subtitle: Business model transition study
description: A 20-year financial analysis of Oracle's transition from perpetual licensing to SaaS, using DuPont decomposition, asset turnover analysis, and quarterly trend inspection.
label: Oracle Analysis

title: Psychological Burden Index & Innovation Analysis
subtitle: Cross-country index study
description: A synthetic psychological burden index built with Hellwig's linear ordering method, then tested against national innovation capacity using indirect behavioral and health indicators.
label: Burden Index

title: Modeling Inflation Drivers in the United States
subtitle: Econometric monthly CPI model
description: An econometric analysis of month-over-month inflation in the US from 2015 to 2021, combining supply shocks, demand pressure, and expectations.
label: Inflation Model
